name: Novelty is the successor Tier-2 inflation driver
description: After the May TCH/SCP always-on gate was closed, NOV>=3 became the mechanism escalating ~46% of daily posts to Tier 2. 11 of 12 June Tier-2 posts carried NOV>=3; only 1 was a bare TCH/SCP-floor escalation. All 11 classifier-vs-structural-grader disagreements were one-directional (classifier higher).
conditions: Post scores NOV>=3 but NAR<=2 and RPR<=2 (novelty is the sole subjective escalator); routine operational/CI/gate/healthcheck subject matter.
evidence: June 2026: Tier1 45.8% (below 60-70% floor), Tier2 50.0% (above 25-35%); NOV>=3 on 11/12 Tier-2 posts; novelty-cap anti-inflation flag fired only 1x despite being the dominant escalator; Brier 0.3782 with 11/11 one-directional over-tier disagreements vs structural grader.

name: Tier-2 narrative-or-standout floor
description: A Tier-2 Deep-Dive requires NAR>=3 (genuine narrative) OR at least one dimension>=4 (a standout). A flat wall of 3s (NAR<=2, nothing>=4) is Tier 1. Operative realization of auto-2026-06-001: simulation showed the novelty-sole-escalator condition never fired retroactively because the real inflation ran through NOV>=3 + a borderline TCH=3 on flat-narrative ops/CI/governance work.
evidence: July 2026 tier-creep calibration: T2 stuck ~50% Jun-Jul (target 25-35%), Brier 0.378 Jun-onward. Simulated on 167 historical decisions: downgrades 4 flat-narrative posts; June T2 50%->38% / T1 46%->58%; last-30 T2 53%->43%; preserves all NAR>=3-or-dim>=4 posts; no Jan/Feb over-deflation.
